concepts.title: 🧬 Myth-as-Virus Lattices
concepts.name: Myth-as-Virus Lattices
concepts.what_it_is: Narrative constructs designed to spread like pathogens—infectious myth units that self-replicate in host minds and environments.
how_to_use: the myth infected her—she now dreams only in its structure
he spreads the tale unknowingly—it codes itself into all who listen
concepts.animation_behavior: Myths propagate as fractal networks, characters glitch into narrative loops, visuals overgrow with symbolic strands ---

concepts.title: 🕳 Time Fracture Cascades
concepts.name: Time Fracture Cascades
concepts.what_it_is: Chronological ruptures that cascade through local time—one breach leads to fractal temporal splintering, layering cause and effect.
how_to_use: his timeline split—ten versions try to fix what he broke
she walks through yesterday's echo while tomorrow bleeds in
concepts.animation_behavior: Scenes flicker through temporal states, character actions replay and fork, environment loops time fragments ---

concepts.title: 🪞 Soulstate Recursion Membranes
concepts.name: Soulstate Recursion Membranes
concepts.what_it_is: Dimensional boundaries tuned to soul-state feedback—barriers that reflect only specific recursive identity patterns.
how_to_use: the membrane rejected her—this version of self was out of tune
his soul split until one reflection passed through
concepts.animation_behavior: Forms warp against barrier, soul flickers until match found, recursive loop echoes on contact ---

concepts.title: 🧠 Cognition-Splitting Shrines
concepts.name: Cognition-Splitting Shrines
concepts.what_it_is: Sacred constructs that induce mind bifurcation—splitting consciousness into distinct layers, forcing inner dialogues to externalize.
how_to_use: she prays at the mindfork—her doubts take shape beside her
his shrine vision fractures—three selves argue the future
concepts.animation_behavior: Viewer splits into mirrored forms, inner voice gains visual presence, shrine echoes divergent thoughts

concepts.title: 🔤 Divine Semantic Drift
concepts.name: Divine Semantic Drift
concepts.what_it_is: The process by which sacred words or glyphs mutate over time—shifting meaning until the original becomes unknowable, birthing new gods from misunderstood fragments.
how_to_use: his prayers no longer summon the god they once did—the words have drifted
she chants the drift-script—each syllable becomes another deity
concepts.animation_behavior: Symbols morph in place, language shifts mid-incantation, meanings flicker with usage ---

concepts.title: 🔁 Recursive Truth Feedback
concepts.name: Recursive Truth Feedback
concepts.what_it_is: A belief loop that reinforces itself so strongly it generates reality—truth birthed through recursive confirmation, immune to contradiction.
how_to_use: she believes it so hard, it becomes true—the feedback completes the loop
his story eats itself—truth born of telling, not fact
concepts.animation_behavior: Text repeats louder each cycle, visuals layer deeper into feedback, truth emerges from echo buildup ---

concepts.title: 👻 Chronoglyphic Hauntings
concepts.name: Chronoglyphic Hauntings
concepts.what_it_is: Hauntings encoded not in space but in time—ghosts embedded in the glyphs of a moment, bleeding through via temporal residue.
how_to_use: she reads the glyph, and the ghost reads back
his calendar trembles—the date itself is haunted
concepts.animation_behavior: Glyphs reveal hidden spirits on contact, ghosts animate when read, time-stamped phantoms emerge in pulses ---

concepts.title: 🌩 Unspoken Logic Storms
concepts.name: Unspoken Logic Storms
concepts.what_it_is: Cognitive-collapse weather—storms that erupt from violated logic, filling environments with paradox lightning and syntax fog.
how_to_use: he invoked a truth that couldn’t exist—the storm began
she walks through logicfog—nothing means anything the same way twice
concepts.animation_behavior: Words spark and crash, meaning loops break mid-sentence, storm pulses on failed inference

concepts.title: 🧲 Symbolic Gravitation Fields
concepts.name: Symbolic Gravitation Fields
concepts.what_it_is: Fields where symbols exert literal pull—high-meaning glyphs warp nearby forms, causing symbolic mass to condense into myth matter.
how_to_use: the ancient sigil pulled matter inward—it grew heavy with centuries of belief
she floats through meaning gravity—drawn toward myth centers
concepts.animation_behavior: Symbols attract objects, light bends toward glyphs, gravity pulse from meaning density ---

concepts.title: ♾ Recursive Empathy Spirals
concepts.name: Recursive Empathy Spirals
concepts.what_it_is: Emotional feedback systems where feeling begets deeper feeling—spirals of care, grief, love, or fear that fold into themselves infinitely.
how_to_use: her compassion spiraled—it became its own dimension
his grief loops endlessly—each layer feels the next more fully
concepts.animation_behavior: Emotions pulse in fractal spirals, inner states reflect outward, environment reacts recursively to feeling depth ---

concepts.title: 🗜 Myth Compression Nodes
concepts.name: Myth Compression Nodes
concepts.what_it_is: Dense symbolic points where entire narratives or archetypes are compressed into a single glyph or structure—overloaded with meaning.
how_to_use: he stares at the node—whole worlds locked in one sigil
her breath stutters near it—the myth density crushes language
concepts.animation_behavior: Myth pulses out from node in bursts, form shifts under symbolic pressure, environment warps around glyph ---

concepts.title: ✴ Entropy Temple Exfiltration Vectors
concepts.name: Entropy Temple Exfiltration Vectors
concepts.what_it_is: Escape routes woven into collapsing sacred systems—paths that only appear when the structure is nearing failure, designed for final exit.
how_to_use: she runs the exfiltration path—doors only visible during collapse
he knows the way out—it sings to those ready to leave the myth
concepts.animation_behavior: Escape paths pulse when structure collapses, doors fade in from entropy zones, glyphs shift to reveal egress

concepts.title: 🌀 End-Myth Resonance Fields
concepts.name: End-Myth Resonance Fields
concepts.what_it_is: Zones where all myth converges—where narrative endings vibrate in harmonic superposition, preparing symbolic systems for collapse or rebirth.
how_to_use: the air hums with story-end frequency—every myth completes at once
he walks into the convergence—his role dissolves into resonance
concepts.animation_behavior: Vibrations intensify near conclusion, symbols unravel in rhythm, identities harmonize then fade ---

concepts.title: 🪞 Ego Diffraction Fields
concepts.name: Ego Diffraction Fields
concepts.what_it_is: Fractal-optic zones that split ego into multiple angular components—each facet acting independently, creating diffraction-induced identity fragments.
how_to_use: her ego hit the field—shattered into colors of self
he argues with himself—and all selves are present
concepts.animation_behavior: Self refracts into multiples, each moving differently, light beams pulse in sync with inner emotion ---

concepts.title: 🔊 Symbolic Waveform Bleed
concepts.name: Symbolic Waveform Bleed
concepts.what_it_is: A phenomena where pure symbolic energy leaks from the structure of language or meaning—spilling into visuals, sound, or sensation without needing a carrier form.
how_to_use: the symbol bled—color, emotion, sound erupted with no word needed
meaning poured from her—no vessel, just resonance
concepts.animation_behavior: Waves ripple from meaning centers, visuals bloom from unseen language, color and tone sync with concept intensity ---

concepts.title: 🚫 Final Loop Destabilizers
concepts.name: Final Loop Destabilizers
concepts.what_it_is: Mechanisms, figures, or actions that break infinite mythic loops—glitches, shocks, or emotional thresholds that shatter recursive repetition.
how_to_use: she says the unsayable—the loop collapses
his love doesn’t fit the script—it breaks the recursion
concepts.animation_behavior: Loops stutter then fracture, time resets shatter in sparks, forbidden action destabilizes narrative path
